sentences.arabic: قَرَأَ الطِّفْلُ سُورَةَ الْفَاتِحَةِ مَعَ أُمِّهِ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je sa majkom pročitalo suru El-Fatihu.
sentences.translationEn: The child read Surah Al-Fatiha with his mother.

sentences.translation: Ponavljali su je više puta dok je nije zapamtio.
sentences.translationEn: They repeated it several times until he memorized it.

sentences.translation: Majka se obradovala kad ju je sam pročitao.
sentences.translationEn: The mother was happy when he read it alone.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتْ: الْقُرْآنُ نُورٌ فِي قَلْبِكَ يَا بُنَيَّ.
sentences.translation: Rekla je: Kur'an je svjetlost u tvom srcu, sinčiću.
sentences.translationEn: She said: The Quran is a light in your heart my son.
